prompt:
A hyper-realistic fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful 18-year-old young girl[keep the face, eyes, lips, nose 100% same as saved in the reference image] sitting on wide stone steps outside a modern café or storefront during golden hour. She is posed in a relaxed, confident way, with one leg bent up toward her chest and the other extended downward, leaning slightly back against the wall.
One hand is lifted into her hair above her head, elbow bent, while the other hand holds a takeaway coffee cup resting near her raised knee. Her head is tilted slightly back and to the side, with a soft, glamorous expression and slightly parted lips. She has long, voluminous, wavy dark brown hair flowing over her shoulders and chest, with a few loose strands catching the sunlight.
She wears large brown-tinted aviator sunglasses, a black bandeau crop top, an oversized white button-down shirt worn off the shoulders, high-waisted loose white trousers, and white lace-up sneakers. Accessories include a silver wristwatch, layered delicate gold necklaces, and rings. Beside her on the step is a beige quilted designer shoulder bag with chain straps and a gold front logo, partially tucked under a wrapped bouquet of white and peach flowers in cream paper.
The setting includes a light beige stone wall, a black window frame, and a dark reflective glass panel in the background. Warm sunset light falls across her face, outfit, and the steps, creating soft golden highlights, realistic skin texture, subtle shadows, cinematic depth, and luxurious warm tones.
